title: Dunkirk Spirit
description: You will explore a bountiful world of colorful and intriguing biomes. Use your magic to survive and your weapons to conquer the evils that lie ahead. Build a base with heavy machinery to ward off new enemies and foes. Forge 1.8.9
body:
Hello fellow Modrinth members and Minecraft lovers alike.  Here we have my first ever Modpack creation known as “Dunkirk Spirit”.  I figured the name is fitting.  Well, without further a do let us go ahead and get into what we have here.
Welcome to the wonderful world of Dunkirk Spirit.  Where all of your Minecraft dreams, adventures and creations come to life!

Drop yourself into a bountiful world of machinery, magic, engineering, questing, weaponry, crafting and never ending exploration.  Horde off many new mobs and much more!!

The main purpose and appeal for this Modpack project is to bring forth new life into an older yet stunning version of Minecraft.  This would be great for those out there that have an under powered PC and are unable to run newer Java 17 Minecraft.

This Modpack first and foremost features an expansive overhauled Overworld dimension.  The Nether and The End dimensions still represent that of Vanilla Minecraft with a few tweaks here and there.

Enjoy the immersive massively overhauled Overworld dimension featuring Biomes O Plenty, Actually Additions, Aquaculture, Better Questing, Food Expansion, Moolands, Pam’s Harvest Craft, XL Food and Tinkers Construct.

Build your dreams and watch them come to life in front of your eyes with Immersive Engineering, ArmorPlus, Backpacks, Base Metals, Chisels & Bits, Compact Storage, Decocraft, Ender Utilities, Immersive Craft, Industrial Craft, Integrated Dynamics, Multi Storage and Quantum Storage.

Go on a mining adventure and find all new Ores, flowers, metals and loot in your Overworld dimension featuring Super Ores, Base Metals, Cooking For Blockheads, Ender Crop, Botania, Nomadic Tents, Pam’s Get All The Seeds and Simple Ores.

Got a plot of land picked out to build on?  Of course you do.  Excavate, level and build the home of your dreams featuring Tech Stack’s Heavy Machinery Mod and Super Multi Drills.  Use massive machinery to get your work done faster and accurately!!

Ward off new foes with weapons and additions such as Mr Crayfish’s Gun Mod, Modern Warfare, Extra Golems and  Flood Lights.

Cast your spells and create an ominous overhaul with amazing mods such as Blood Magic, Evil Craft, Lightning Craft and Dark Utilities.

Prepare yourself to fight off “THE GRUE” as you adventure, quest and explore this massive world with your friends.  The Grue is always watching.  Get ready for the fight of your life.

Last but not least.  This Modpack does require both server and slient to function properly unless otherwise stated.

Thank you everyone for checking this out.  I greatly appreciate your time and patience.

Versions
Forge 1.8.9
Forge Modloader 11.15.1.2318 (recommended)


Credits
